description: Composition Purple printed kurta with pleats made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves, rounded boat neckline, buttoned chest placket, panel on the upper chest created with pin tucks that fan out into pleats, has and small split side hems Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and pumps for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtis Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
